nodes.name: Contact Found? Find Contact by Contact ID
Check if Active Entry is Canvassing

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "{{contact.first_name}}, the calculator's still up - takes about 5 minutes, no rep in your house. Want it so you can see your price?", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

nodes.name: Check if Active Entry is Canvassing #2

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "Hey {{contact.first_name}}, {{custom_values.rep_name}} here with Reece. You looked at windows a while back but didn't move forward. Most people don't - they don't want a rep in their house before seeing real pricing. We built a way to see it yourself. About 5 min, no call. Want me to send it?", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

Want me to send it?", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

nodes.name: Check if Active Entry is Canvassing #5

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "{{contact.first_name}}, calculator's still up if you want to check. About 5 min, no rep. Want it so you can see your price?", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'Email', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, subject: "Let's get you that price", html: " Let's get you that price
5 minutes, no rep. Just a real estimate. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Quick note - the calculator's still up if you want to see your price.

This isn't a vague ballpark. It's an actual number based on your home.

Takes about 5 minutes, you'll just need a tape measure.

Most people never actually check, and just stay unsure what it would cost.

Get My Number →

Talk soon,

{{custom_values.rep_name}}

P.S. Takes about 5 minutes. No rep in your house.

Reece Windows & Doors
{{location.full_address}}

Unsubscribe

© {{right_now.year}} {{location.name}}

", from: "randy@getreecewindows.com", fromName: "Randy Reece" }) }}

parameters.content:
## S1.2 Calculator Re-engagement
Translated from GHL workflow bf894396-1cd9-4095-8789-7ce12a4e412a.
GHL triggers: inbound_webhook:Inbound Agentic Trigger

Entry is a webhook (orchestrator-driven). Credentials by ID only; brand law applied to email senders (Randy Reece). See workflow node notes for [STUB] items.
Flags: 1 | Stubs: 0 | Brand-law: 0
